sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 82 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For Orders on Office Objection No. 25. 2. For orders on CMA No. 132/2021 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 14.01.2026 Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate files power on behalf of applicant, which is taken on record. Learned counsel states that the questions before the court have already been decided against the applicant / department by virtue of Division Bench judgment dated 01.12.2025 in ITRA No. 20 of 2021. He states that the said judgment is squarely binding upon this bench, therefore, in mutatis mutandis application thereof, the present reference may be dismissed subject to right of the applicant to prefer an appeal before the Supreme Court. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
